div1.entryFree:
Ravel, 1) tr. to entangle: the --ed sleave of care, Mcb. II, 2, 37. to r. out == to disentangle: must I r. out my weaved-up folly? R2 IV, 228. to r. all this matter out, Hml. III, 4, 186.
2) intr. to become entangled: as you unwind her love from him, lest it should r., you must provide to bottom it on me, Gent. III, 2, 52.
